title: No Crosshair
body:
## description + example
**This resource pack removes the crosshairs in the center of the screen while playing minecraft.**
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/825fa7da63c4b3b64fa60ccb29e60098fe0ef8bc.jpeg)


##  what do I do if I get an error?
**Ignore** if it says “**made for an older version of Minecraft”.**

![Ignore it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc41f44ed955811127e3f2d55a58efe51555ba9.jpeg)

**!!! resource pack works on versions from 1.8.9 to 1.21.x !!!**
